DECLARATION OF APPEARANCE ON BEHALF OF CORPORATION PURSUANT TO CCP 116.540 (B)-(H) FILED BY PLAINTIFF ARMAS, PANFILO DBA AMERICAN ROOFING COMPANY
EXHIBITS FROM EXHIBIT REPORT DATED MAR-01-2010 ORDERED DESTROYED
SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF NOV-20-2009 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF NOV-20-2009 BY JUDGE PRO TEM: MARK SCHREIBER. APPEARANCE BY BOTH PARTIES. EXHIBITS RETAINED. CLERK: S. VANTREE. NOT REPORTED. (506)

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF ARMAS, PANFILO DBA AMERICAN ROOFING COMPANY IS NOT OWED ANY MONEY BY DEFENDANT STEVINSON-SANCHEZ, VALERIE STEVINSON, MARK A. BAUSCHKA, CHRISTOPHER C BAUSCHKA, SHANNON M. DEROZIERS, ERIC RUBIN THE COURT FINDS THAT THE DEFENDANTS WERE NOT INFORMED OF THE UNILATERAL ERROR OF PLAINTIFF WITH RESPECT TO THE AGREED UPON COST OF THE WORK, AND THAT THE AMOUNT OF THE DIFFERENCE IS NOT SO GREAT THAT PLAINTIFF SHOULD BE RELIEVED OF HIS OBLIGATION TO ABIDE BY THE TERMS OF THE AGREEMENT ON THE BASIS THE DEFENDANT'S SHOULD HAVE BEEN ON NOTICE OF THE ERROR BY PLAINTIFF. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S AND DEFENDANT'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
